verification_rule: Use redeem_test only after an actual in-game redemption. Use official Roblox/Discord/Trello evidence first; otherwise require at least two credible current sources or one current source explicitly citing official Discord. Move codes to expired only when expiry evidence is strong.

sources.name: Official Roblox game page
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Public HTML identifies Sailor Piece by Shadowrise Devs, dateModified 06/20/2026, max level 20000, and directly lists NEW CODES: KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED and RAIDUPDATENOW. It does not expose rewards, per-code level requirements, or expiry proof for older codes.

sources.name: Official Discord invite
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Public HTML loads the official Sailor Piece Discord invite and showed about 1,407,238 members, but it does not expose channel messages or current code-list posts, so it is not direct code evidence today.

sources.name: Official Trello board JSON
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Board name is Sailor Piece and dateLastActivity is 2026-06-12T02:16:43.308Z, but the Actives Codes card was last active 2026-04-08 and still contains old FREECODE/500MVISITS/ICEQUEEN/MINIUPDATE entries. Not used as decisive current code proof.

sources.name: Pocket Tactics Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Accessible markup lists KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED and RAIDUPDATENOW plus the retained June/May reward-family codes active, but places SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG in expired context, creating a conflict.

sources.name: Pro Game Guides Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated June 15, 2026. Active list has 10 codes: RAIDUPDATENOW, KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3/2, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, FREECODEFORYALL, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS. It marks 1MIL200KLIKESWOWW, FREECODEFORYALLL3, BIGDELAYSSORRYCODE, 1BIL500MILVISITSTYSM, FREECODEFORYALLL2, and SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG inactive.

sources.name: Beebom Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Article header says Updated: June 15, 2026. It lists KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, RAIDUPDATENOW, 1MIL200KLIKESWOWW, FREECODEFORYALLL3, and BIGDELAYSSORRYCODE active with exact rewards. It lists 1BIL/FREECODEFORYALLL2 and many older retained codes expired, so it is direct support for the newer codes and conflict context for older retained codes.

sources.name: GamesRadar Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Accessible structured content says recent update June 15, 2026. Lists KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED level 12,500 and RAIDUPDATENOW level 9,000, then SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3/2, MASTERY, GHOULUPDATE, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, FREECODEFORYALL, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, and RAIDS active. It lists the June 9 codes, 1BIL/FREECODEFORYALLL2, and SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG expired.

sources.name: Destructoid Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Published/updated June 18, 2026 in accessible markup. Lists KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED and RAIDUPDATENOW active with rewards, and keeps SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG2/3, MASTERY, GHOULUPDATE, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, FREECODEFORYALL, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, and RAIDS active. It lists the June 9 additions and 1BIL/FREECODEFORYALLL2 expired, creating conflicts.

sources.name: PCGamesN Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated June 18, 2026 and explicitly says no new Sailor Piece codes this week. Lists KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, RAIDUPDATENOW, the June 9 codes, 1BIL/FREECODEFORYALLL2, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3/2, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, and FREECODEFORYALL as latest codes. Its new-code reward text conflicts with Beebom, Pro Game Guides, Pocket Tactics, Destructoid, and Radio Times. It lists SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, GHOULUPDATE, and MASTERY expired, and omits RAIDS from the latest-code list while placing it in expired context.

sources.name: U7BUY Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: June 15, 2026 page says the newest codes were compiled from official Discord announcements and manually verified. It lists all 16 retained active codes plus several old/new-server-only codes that remain expired in our data because they conflict with stronger established expired context and no direct official message was accessible.

sources.name: Radio Times Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Published June 15, 2026. Lists KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, RAIDUPDATENOW, the June 9 codes, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3/2/base, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, FREECODEFORYALL, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, MASTERY, GHOULUPDATE, and HUGEUPDATEWWW active. Used only as supplementary support/conflict context because it also keeps some older codes active that stronger current sources treat as expired.

sources.name: Pocket Gamer Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Accessible page/search result lists many June and old codes active, including several already expired in our data, but did not clearly surface the official June 15 KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED/RAIDUPDATENOW pair in the extracted text. Used only as conflict context, not as decisive evidence.

decisions.reason: Official Roblox game page dateModified 06/20/2026 still directly lists KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED and RAIDUPDATENOW under NEW CODES. Multiple current third-party sources also list them active. No additional official new code string was found.

Official Roblox lists it under NEW CODES and GamesRadar still lists its level requirement as 12,500. Rewards remain supported by Pocket Tactics, Pro Game Guides, Beebom, Destructoid, and Radio Times; PCGamesN reward conflict was not enough to change the stored bundle.

Official Roblox lists it under NEW CODES and GamesRadar still explicitly lists its level requirement as 9,000. Rewards remain supported by Pocket Tactics, Pro Game Guides, Beebom, Destructoid, and Radio Times; PCGamesN reward conflict was not enough to change the stored bundle.

Pocket Tactics, PCGamesN, Beebom, Radio Times, and U7BUY still list these active/current, while Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, and Destructoid list them inactive/expired. No official expiry proof was accessible.
Pocket Tactics, PCGamesN, and U7BUY still list these active/current, while Beebom, Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, and Destructoid list them expired/inactive. No official expiry proof was accessible.

PCGamesN, Destructoid, Radio Times, and U7BUY list it active/current, while Pocket Tactics, GamesRadar, Pro Game Guides, and Beebom list it expired/inactive. Kept active because current active evidence remains and no accessible official expiry proof was found.

Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Destructoid, Pocket Tactics, Radio Times, and U7BUY still support much of this set as active/current, while Beebom or PCGamesN conflict for parts of it. No accessible official expiry proof was found.

U7BUY, Pocket Gamer, and Radio Times list some previously expired or old codes as active/new-server-only, but this conflicts with multiple established current pages and no direct official Discord message was accessible. Did not reactivate without stronger proof.
No active code had official or strong enough cross-source expiry evidence to move today. Existing conflicts were retained in notes and source_conflicts.

source_conflicts.conflict: PCGamesN reward text for KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED and RAIDUPDATENOW conflicts with Pocket Tactics, Pro Game Guides, Beebom, Destructoid, and Radio Times. The majority reward bundle was retained.
source_conflicts.next_step: Update rewards only if official Discord/Trello/in-game proof or stronger current-source agreement contradicts the majority bundle.

source_conflicts.conflict: Pocket Tactics, PCGamesN, Beebom, Radio Times, and U7BUY list these active/current; Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, and Destructoid list them inactive/expired.
source_conflicts.next_step: Move to expired only if official evidence appears or current-source expiry agreement becomes stronger than active evidence.

source_conflicts.conflict: Pocket Tactics, PCGamesN, and U7BUY list these active/current; Beebom, Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, and Destructoid list them expired/inactive.
source_conflicts.next_step: Keep active until official expiry proof or stronger current expiry agreement appears.

source_conflicts.conflict: PCGamesN, Destructoid, Radio Times, and U7BUY list it active/current; Pocket Tactics, GamesRadar, Pro Game Guides, and Beebom list it expired/inactive.
source_conflicts.next_step: Move to expired only if official Discord/Trello confirms expiry or stronger current sources join explicit expired evidence.

source_conflicts.conflict: Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Destructoid, Pocket Tactics, Radio Times, and U7BUY support active status for much of this set; Beebom or PCGamesN conflict for parts of the set.
source_conflicts.next_step: Do not move based on one or two conflicting sources without official or broader current expiry proof.

source_conflicts.conflict: U7BUY, Pocket Gamer, and Radio Times list some old codes such as 700KFAVSTY, FREECODEHERE1, HUGEUPDATEWWW, DELAYCODENR1/2, visit/follow codes, or similar old codes as active/new-server-only, while multiple established current sources treat them as expired and direct official proof was not accessible.
source_conflicts.next_step: Reactivate only with direct official/in-game evidence or broad current agreement.
